Hi, I’m Healey Joseph!

… a young IT professional skilled in Python, SQL, and Linux with passions for cybersecurity, automation, and continuous learning. I exceed expectations by centering strong communication around technical work.\ For recruiting inquiries, connect with me on LinkedIn.\ Welcome to my blog.
